original_image_tags: scan of a single page of typed text on aged paper. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top. The text is a brief incident report.

elements.description: A typed document containing a paragraph of text describing a UFO sighting incident. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts embedded in the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only typed text with no visual images (photographs, sketches, etc.), so there is no visual content to disagree about.
